theme: E4 cycle 7 — the DATA/generator cycle that executes the four structural items c155's measure cycle deferred (a measure cycle could only lift edge_honesty to the GREEN floor with copy/CSS; the deeper wins are data/generator). (1) cluster the 19 orphan/edgeless nodes into a labelled Mermaid subgraph -> edge_honesty 4->5; (2) rename aDNANetwork.aDNA -> Network.aDNA at the REGISTRY SOURCE (the c155 'a regen fixes it' note was wrong — Home.aDNA inventory was itself stale) then regen; (3) give supersedes a genuinely distinct stroke vs companion; (4) a keyboard node-twin so the graph round-trip is not mouse-exclusive. III 7-step.
register: Tokyo Night dark-first; honest-topology (the 19 unlinked nodes are NAMED + BOXED as an intentional 'Not yet linked' holding area, not hidden, faked, or left as a broken-looking dead column; zero fabricated edges); <=2 fighting colors (the distinct supersedes stroke uses GEOMETRY — long-dash + thicker — NOT a new accent color, so the cyan/purple budget is untouched and the stroke stays theme-aware-AA in both modes); motion unchanged; no marketing adjectives; a11y both modes (the keyboard node-twin adds a real focusable AT path, axe-clean, revealed on :focus-within).
operator_scope: THREE decisions confirmed at the plan gate (AskUserQuestion): (1) RENAME = write Home.aDNA inventory NOW — fix at the registry source, an explicit operator override of Standing Rule 4 / the campaign no-Home.aDNA-writes boundary (it is a catch-up to on-disk reality: ~/aDNA/Network.aDNA/ is already the real dir, aDNANetwork.aDNA + LatticeNetwork.aDNA are symlinks to it); (2) SCOPE = all 4 items in c156; (3) VERIFY = self-score the 5-item rubric (no lens Workflow this cycle). COMMIT-ONLY (the E4 surface bundles its deploy later).

iii_7step.measure: Machine baseline GREEN before touching anything: build 162pp/0err; prebuild generator byte-idempotent (only the date-only generated_at stamp rolled 2026-06-04->2026-06-06); gates green-by-inheritance from the c155 close commit 2330cf1 (73/73, nothing changed since the clean pull). Confirmed the actual problem set from the c155 measure: edge_honesty stuck at the floor (orphans rendered as a tall dead column in a FLAT node list — the orphans were ALREADY rendered, just unboxed), supersedes == companion dashed (3 distinct dash signatures needed), and the Network.aDNA node identity stale because the REGISTRY SOURCE (Home.aDNA inventory) still said aDNANetwork.aDNA (the c155 regen-fixes-it assumption was wrong).
iii_7step.orient: Four deferred items, all data/generator + one site-surface a11y add. The rename is a CROSS-VAULT write (Hestia's domain) — established E4 pattern is aDNA.aDNA owns reconciliation seams (network_edges.yaml/ADR-033) and upstream truth lands in Home.aDNA via Hestia; operator chose to fix at source NOW. The card MUST be renamed in lockstep (the generator keys cards by inventory name; a mismatch drops card_present -> the node loses its Venus persona + class overlay). The 19 orphans were already in the graph (flat) so clustering changes node-DEFINITION order only (link indices unchanged -> supersedes linkStyle indices stay valid).
iii_7step.select: All 4 (operator scope): (A) Home.aDNA rename at source; (B) generator orphan-subgraph + supersedes linkStyle; (C) regen + idempotency verify; (D) graph.astro keyboard node-twin + supersedes legend. Distinct-supersedes approach chosen = GEOMETRY not color (a fixed linkStyle color can't clear 3:1 graphical contrast on BOTH the dark and light canvases; long-dash 10 6 + 2.5px keeps the island's theme-aware lineColor and reads apart from companion's fine dash).
iii_7step.implement: PART A (Home.aDNA, Hestia domain, operator-approved cross-vault, LOCAL-ONLY commit ecbbd9e no push): inventory_vaults.yaml entry name aDNANetwork.aDNA->Network.aDNA + previous_names extended + path/governance + rename note; inventory_vaults.md (table row + totals + dated M24-note correction, .md/.yaml kept in sync per skill_inventory_refresh); vault card git mv the_aDNANetwork.aDNA.md->the_Network.aDNA.md + frontmatter (vault/vault_slug/governance/manifest_path/state_path/canonical_governance/img_path/last_synced/synced_from node.aDNA->Home.aDNA) + body refs; card image git mv aDNANetwork.aDNA.jpg->Network.aDNA.jpg; CHANGELOG [Unreleased] entry. PART B (aDNA.aDNA scripts/build_vaults_data.mjs Mermaid emission): connected/orphan node partition from the edge set -> connected at top level, orphans wrapped in subgraph orphans["Not yet linked: N vaults..."] direction TB; emitted-link counter tracks supersedes indices -> linkStyle <idx> stroke-width:2.5px,stroke-dasharray:10 6. PART D (site/src/pages/vaults/graph.astro): keyboard node-twin <nav class='graph-node-list visually-hidden'> of 40 real /vaults/<slug>/ anchors from vaultNameMap (outside the aria-hidden svg; clip-path visually-hidden, NOT display:none; :focus-within reveal like a skip-link); .le-super legend -> 3px dashed to mirror the graph.
iii_7step.re_measure: build PASS 162pp/0err (the network vault-detail route auto-moved /vaults/aDNANetwork.aDNA/ -> /vaults/Network.aDNA/, 200). Gates 73/73 GREEN — gate-4 axe 0 WCAG-AA BOTH dark+light on /network + /vaults/graph + /vaults/Harness.aDNA (the keyboard twin + renamed graph + supersedes stroke all clean). Generator byte-idempotent (snapshot->regen->diff IDENTICAL on both vaults.json + vaults_graph.mmd). Lighthouse: /network 98 (=baseline) / Network.aDNA detail 99 A11y 100 / /vaults/graph 88-92 (3 runs 88,92,89; median ~89; A11y 100; CLS 0) — a small drop from the noisy ~90-93 baseline, the compound-subgraph dagre cost on the client-side Mermaid render. Visual eyeball (per the c154/c155 lesson): the 19 orphans now render in a BORDERED box labelled 'Not yet linked: 19 vaults with no cited relationship' (intentional shelf, not a broken column); Network.aDNA renders with the Venus subtitle (card_present held); 3 distinct edge dash signatures present (solid 0px / companion 2px / supersedes 10px,6px).
iii_7step.record: this JSON + cycle log in the session + mission/STATE/campaign cascade

rationale.edge_honesty_4_to_5: TARGET HIT. The three Diagram-Reviewer structural findings all closed: (a) the orphan set is now a labelled, bordered holding area reading as honest-sparse-by-design, not a broken dead column; (b) supersedes has a genuinely distinct stroke (long-dash 10px/6px + 2.5px vs companion's 2px fine dash — verified via getComputedStyle: 3 distinct dash signatures); (c) the stale aDNANetwork.aDNA identity is fixed to Network.aDNA. Zero fabricated edges throughout.
rationale.navigability_4.5_to_4.75: The keyboard node-twin closes the c155 'mouse-only round-trip' caveat — 40 real focusable /vaults/<slug>/ anchors mirror the pointer-only nodes, revealed on :focus-within. Not a full 5 only because the focus-visible UX wasn't independently reviewed (self-score conservatism).

self_score.result: No rubric item < 4; edge_honesty reaches the target 5. The rubric is GREEN with the structural ceiling lifted.

It reads as an intentional bordered holding area (the edge_honesty win holds), but a more compact multi-row/chip grid would be tidier. Mermaid can't grid natively — candidate a custom non-Mermaid chip row OR accept the shelf. c157/c159 nicety.

/vaults/graph Perf (now ~89, was ~90-93) — the 40-node + compound-subgraph client-side Mermaid layout. The firm fix = build-time SSR/prerender of the graph SVG OR lazy/in-view render. NOW MORE URGENT (the subgraph added compound-layout cost). c159 decadal.

aar_lightweight.worked: Reading the registry SOURCE first (the Home.aDNA inventory) caught that the c155 'a regen fixes the stale name' assumption was wrong — the inventory itself was stale, so the fix had to go upstream. Renaming the vault card in LOCKSTEP with the inventory name preserved card_present (the node kept its Venus persona + class through the rename — a silent mismatch would have stripped it). Eyeballing the rendered graph (not just the gates) confirmed the orphan box + the 3 distinct dash signatures actually land.
aar_lightweight.didnt: The orphan subgraph laid out as a wide horizontal shelf despite `direction TB` (Mermaid ignores subgraph direction when there are no internal edges to order) — acceptable but not the compact column I designed for. And the graph Perf dipped ~4 points (compound-subgraph dagre cost) — expected but it nudges the page just under the 90 soft-floor.
aar_lightweight.finding: The deepest legibility wins really ARE structural/data (as c155 predicted): clustering + a source rename + a geometry-based stroke moved edge_honesty to 5 where no amount of copy could. And the cross-vault rename had a sharp dependency (card-in-lockstep) that only surfaced by reading the generator's projection logic first.
aar_lightweight.change: When a graph-render cycle adds nodes/containers, budget for a Perf dip and pair it with the prerender deferral rather than treating Perf>=90 as a hard gate for a not-deployed internal page. Keep reading the SOURCE registry before assuming a downstream regen fixes a name.
aar_lightweight.follow_up: c157/c158 = the remaining measure/iterate slots (optionally a confirming lens Workflow on edge_honesty + navigability); c159 = E4 decadal close (AAR + ADR-033 ratify + the graph prerender Perf fix). The Home.aDNA credential/membership LatticeNetwork.aDNA sweep stays Rosetta's separate pass.

notes: The c156 data/generator cycle delivered the structural edge_honesty=5 ceiling the c155 measure cycle deferred: the 19 unlinked vaults are now a labelled, bordered 'Not yet linked' holding area (honest-sparse-by-design, not a broken column), supersedes has a genuinely distinct long-dash stroke (geometry, not a new color — theme-aware-AA preserved), and the stale aDNANetwork.aDNA identity is fixed at the REGISTRY SOURCE (operator-approved Home.aDNA write; card renamed in lockstep so the Venus overlay survived). The keyboard node-twin closes the c155 mouse-only-round-trip caveat axe-cleanly. The one honest cost: /vaults/graph Perf slipped to ~89 (compound-subgraph dagre layout) — accepted + documented, reinforcing the c159 graph-prerender deferral. Generator byte-idempotent; 73/73 gates; axe 0 AA both modes; commit-only.
